title: Mosaic Host Manifest v1
description: What a host publishes so models can target it accurately: capabilities and policy, never design. The host's renderer draws every component; semantic token names are standardized by Mosaic and token values never travel. See docs/proposal.md §3.3.

interactive.description: Whether the renderer honors local interactivity (bind:state, on:event). A static surface (email, plain text) sets false and renders controls in their default state.

components_supported.description: Rich components the renderer draws natively (DataTable, Chart, Tree, Board, …). Unsupported ones fall back through decomposeTo.

permissions.description: Host policy on gated blocks (e.g. Embed). Defaults are conservative; Embed defaults to deny.

strict.description: When true, unknown tags and missing required props fail validation rather than rendering as a debug Box.
